_purpose: Phase 2 of Katrina's Collection (S275 paper-napkin seed). Mix-and-match attribute table for randomly rolling 107 cute Salem ghost personas, one per HIST_BLDG POI. Each ghost = pick 1 from each column. Will be superseded when SalemIntelligence2 is ready (~1 week, per operator S275) and ghosts can be deterministically seeded from per-building history.
_style_spine: cute watercolor Salem ghost, PG-13, soft palette, single subject portrait, transparent edges
_pairing: Every ghost gets TWO portraits: image_a uses 'expressions' pool (normal); image_b uses 'expressions_alt' pool (fourth-wall-break smirks). All other attributes (profession, oddity, hair, frame) MUST be identical between A and B for the pair to read as the same ghost. Recommended SD path: generate A with txt2img + locked seed, then generate B with face-only inpaint (masked img2img) using A as init — background stays bit-identical. Runtime: 2% chance on each ghost-view shows B instead of A.

_eligible_categories._comment: Which salem_pois.category values are ghost-eligible. V1 = HIST_BLDG only (107 buildings). Future commercial tiers will add paying-merchant categories — leaving the structure in place so the batch script and persona-roller can extend without refactor.
_eligible_categories.future_persona_notes: Commercial ghosts may want category-flavored profession picks (e.g., RESTAURANT defaults to Bartender / Bar Maid / Ale Maker / Store Keeper from the existing professions pool; LODGING toward Store Keeper / Widow). The attribute pool stays the same — only the per-category roll-weighting changes. A premium 'gold' frame variant could also be reserved for paid placements without breaking the random-roll model.

expressions_alt: the faintest knowing smile with eyes softly meeting the viewer
a barely-there sly grin with a single raised eyebrow
a slow subtle wink, mouth otherwise still
one raised eyebrow and the corner of the mouth lifted
a quiet direct gaze with the hint of a smile, breaking the fourth wall
a soft closed-mouth smirk with eyes fixed on the viewer
a self-satisfied half-smile, slight head tilt, eyes on you
a subtle smug expression with half-lidded eyes
a small playful smirk with direct eye contact
lips just barely curled, eyes fixed forward, 'I see you'
a gentle mona-lisa smile aimed straight at the camera
an almost-imperceptible smile, eyebrows slightly raised
_expressions_alt_note: S278 toned down — operator: 'B images too extreme, need to be more subtle'. Removed wide-grin / cheshire-cat / toothy-grin variants in favor of micro-expressions and fourth-wall breaks that read as a hint rather than a stunt.
witchy_props: a black cat curled on the shoulder
a black raven perched on the shoulder
a tiny floating candle hovering by the head
a glowing green potion bottle held up
a battered spellbook clutched to the chest
a crooked twig wand glowing at the tip
a small jack-o-lantern peeking from below
a corked bottle of fireflies in hand
a chipped tea cup balanced in one hand
a tobacco pipe trailing wisp-smoke
a battered broomstick over one shoulder
a string of dried herbs hanging from collar
a tarnished iron key on a ribbon
a glowing crystal pendant at the neck
a tiny bat fluttering near the ear
a pewter tankard raised slightly
a quill behind one ear with ink-smudged fingers
a tattered prayer book in hand
a folded sea-chart tucked under one arm
a small toad sitting on top of the head
wisps of green spirit-smoke curling around the head
a tarnished sextant in hand
a wooden ship's wheel in the foreground edge
a tied corn-husk poppet held forward
a bone necklace draped at the neck
a frayed witch-hat brim peeking at top of frame
a hand of cards fanned out in one hand
a clay pipe clenched in teeth trailing wisp-smoke
a kettle of bubbling brew in the periphery
a small black goat-skull pendant
_witchy_props_note: S278 — per-ghost rolled prop occupies the `{prop}` slot in PROMPT_TEMPLATE. Picked one-per-ghost via the per-POI deterministic RNG. Witchy/Halloween-flavored across all professions so even non-witch ghosts (cordwainer, sea-captain, customs officer) carry Salem-October atmosphere. PG-13 floor: no gore, no satanic iconography.

frames.desc: Wrought-iron Halloween border, raven emblem at top center
Braided maritime rope border, anchor emblem at top center
Autumn vines and leaves border, small pumpkin emblem at top center
Carved gothic wood border, small skull emblem at top center
Tarnished brass with rivets, compass-rose emblem at top center
Stitched colonial leather border, witch-hat emblem at top center
Bone-edged border, crescent moon emblem at top center
Carved gravestone border, jack-o'-lantern emblem at top center

_frames_note: S275 simplification: replaced the prior 12 shape x 8 metal heraldic model with 8 self-contained rectangular overlay PNGs. Each frame is a full-tile border with transparent interior + decorated edges + baked-in top-center emblem. No runtime color compositing, no aperture masks. Persona rolls pick one of the 8 by slug. Asset PNGs not yet generated — slugs and asset filenames declared here as targets.
